records.Name: Global Industries
records.AI_Summary__c: Global Industries is a strategic-tier brokerage managing a diversified portfolio of £8.5m GWP against a £10m target. Strong relationship score of 85 reflects consistent senior engagement across Financial Lines and Casualty portfolios. Two active submissions in late-stage renewal, with the Group Strategy review confirming appetite for expanded capacity in Q3.

records.Name: Acme Corp
records.AI_Summary__c: Acme Corp is a preferred-tier subsidiary of Global Industries managing £2.4m GWP against a £3m target. Relationship score of 72 indicates growth potential. Two open claims — Warehouse Fire and Third Party Injury — require active management. Property and Liability renewals in early stage with strong broker engagement from Amy Taylor.
